title: Eric Boyt
compiled_truth: Eric Boyt is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-10 to 2002-04-03), Eric Boyt sent 83 and received 376 emails, totalling 459 interactions. Top correspondents: [Charles Weldon](people/charles-weldon) (21), [V Weldon](people/v-weldon) (10), [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (9), [John Griffith](people/john-griffith) (9), [Eric Moon](people/eric-moon) (8).
